feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: All My Traitor Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,189Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Gotham, 1935. Bruce Malone is a private investigator with a shingle, a past he doesn'tadvertise, and a client who smells like jasmine and trouble in equal measure. Diana Prinkipas needs a treasure found. Clark Kent needs a job. Bruce needs to stop noticing things he has no business noticing. Nobody gets what they need. A noir in sixteen movements, one interrogation tape, and a coat button that costs twenty years.

entry.title: An Unhealthy Obssession
entry.summary:
Author: Su1c1d4l_4l3x4nd3r

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,733Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 177

Summary: "All that we see or seem is but a dream within a dream.” You move back to Gotham after failing to make it in Metropolis and accidentally stumble onto a murder scene laced with Scarecrow’s fear gas. Shaken and paranoid from the exposure, you run right into Red Robin on patrol. Instead of being seen as a victim, your behavior makes you look guilty. Tim’s instincts kick in, and he convinces himself you’re hiding something. From there, he starts watching, digging, and following — obsessed with proving a guilt that isn’t really there. or Tim Drake being a fucking creep, like he is programmed to be. Tim Drake x Male reader.

entry.title: Homecoming
entry.summary:
Author: Jayden_Jones (KoaKillianAZ)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,317Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Richard Grayson doesn't hate his parents, he really doesn't. He loves them, he loves his father Clark and his mom Bruce, and he loves his siblings. But he needs time, time to think, time to define who he is.They had a fight, a very bad one, the worst they ever had, mama and papa really don't like the idea of him being a superhero, so he ran, he ran away from home. Robin is not dumb, he knows that his parents know where he is, apparently they are giving him timeNow he is here, with this team, a team full of young superheroes, people who he loves, but who have no idea who he truly is.That doesn't matter anymore, because his little brother Jason just called him. Mama and Papa just went missing, and that means Robin has to go home----Or: What if the robin from the 2003 titans show was a superbat baby

entry.title: L’appel Du Vide
entry.summary:
Author: NyxieSpades27

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,039Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: L'appel Due Vide Human instincts can't always be trusted.We can be on the highest of grounds, our steps measured, our breath cutting short in fear. And as you look down, you can either embrace fear like a safe blanket, forbidding you to do anything illogical. Or you could succumb to the endless urge of letting go, accepting the dark pit below like one final hug —cold and painful— from death's welcoming arms.   The Justice League: The Greatest Heroes of the World, bring hope in salvation and faith of another waking day to the common civilians. But where does it come from? That...motivation to keep going? That small voice in their head which...they aren't able to recognize, yet sounds oh-so-familiar? Were they Dreams?Fantasies?Hallucinations? Or something as terrifying as memories?   — Also known as a story about a different timeline where our heroes' legacies and sidekicks were taken in by the wrong people at the perfect time.

entry.title: 76 Percent Humidity Can’t Be Legal
entry.summary:
Author: robbieslaays

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,518Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: It was 1:32 AM and Tim could not for the actual life of him sleep. The reason he could not sleep was a fixable one, granted more difficult with his boyfriend Kon, beside him, who stored up too much of the sun's gentleness and heat into his body than 62 degrees on a Sunday morning would make up for. And to be fair, it wasn't a lot, for as much as Gotham was trying to be cold, a tropical storm a day prior caused it to be 76 percent more humid outside.   Or: Tim is trying to sleep but it is unbearably hot.

entry.title: A thing about Reporters…
entry.summary:
Author: Eevee_the_cat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,695Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 283

Summary: Superman couldn’t help but be offended by Batman’s hesitation towards reporters. Whenever one came up, Batman would disappear entirely into the shadows, doing all he could to not spit in their direction. When he finally learns of his identity, mild mannered Clark Kent feels awful.

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,853Chapters: 7/32Kudos: 53

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

entry.title: 4 Times Clark Carried Bruce (+1 Last Time)
entry.summary:
Author: remember_april_andbeglad

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,800Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 33

Summary: Four times Clark carried Bruce. And one last time. (Or: Clark and Bruce learn to share the uneven weight of growing old together.) - The first time Clark carried Bruce, both men were still stewing over their earlier... caped introduction to each other. [...] In all the times afterward that Clark carried Bruce, he never got lighter. He just shifted the weight. This morning, it was one foot after another on the quiet crunch of autumn leaves as Clark walked outside to watch the sun rise once more on the Kent Farm.Bruce had been gone for centuries now, and Clark could feel the passage of time in the world around him.

entry.title: The S Stands for Hope
entry.summary:
Author: FPeanutButter98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,249Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 58

Summary: Clark Kent just wants to go out and help people, but he's only twenty three. Clark has to learn to be Superman while balancing a job at the Daily Planet, and a handsome Billionare who just bought his workplace. he's not sure how long he can keep the connection between Clark Kent and Superman a secret, especially from someone like Mr. Wayne.

entry.summary:

entry.title: A Little Spider Caught up in a Hood
entry.summary:
Author: FayeVilla418

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,478Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Peter wakes up to green. He died. But he's alive. And in another universe too, neat. He breaks out of the glass tube He was in, goes feral, attacking the scientists that had him locked up. He has turned into more of a spider, he never used to have fangs or venom. The door gets broken down while Peter's jaws are still clamped down on a quickly fading flailing kidnapper. It's Red Hood. Red Hood takes in the situation and decides to take Peter, keep him at a safe house, under lock and key, away from the bats, who had gotten to the Lazura's pit just after Jason had left. Peter tries to accept these new changes and this new universe, knowing that there was almost absolutely no way back. And no one would look for him either. At least he has Jason. But the bats break into the safe house Pete's staying at and immedietly assume that Peter is Jason's bf. Anytime they try to deny it, it just feeds into their assumption. Oh well.

entry.title: Eternity
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,449Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 49

Summary: On a cruise ship, Clark Kent's Kryptonian biology recognizes something in Bruce Wayne that even Bruce doesn't see: kor'va—soul recognition. The moment one consciousness knows another will change everything. Three years later, they undergo ra'sh'mora, the ancient Kryptonian bonding ritual. It's not marriage. It's a permanent quantum entanglement of two nervous systems. Clark feels Bruce constantly—his heartbeat, his emotions, his presence. They are never alone again. Then Bruce's heart starts failing.

entry.title: Conflict of Interest
entry.summary:
Author: BlackLynx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,107Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: A reimagined first meeting between Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne during their early days as Superman and Batman. Following Clark's perspective, the young journalist finds himself under the relentless gaze of Bruce Wayne and Batman, unsure whether it is Clark or Superman he is trying to decipher – unable to help his nerves from acting up.Features Lois Lane and Clark being best friends, Bruce being a bit cocky and forward, Zatanna as Bruce's beard, a dazzling Gala, some heroics, and a quickly resolved misunderstanding.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Hero Who Fell to Earth - A Superbat Love Story
entry.summary:
Author: EllEmmeCe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 114,784Chapters: 56/56Kudos: 480

Summary: When Superman’s latest battle ends with a devastating Solar Flare, the unthinkable happens: Clark Kent is left powerless, mortal, and broken. With his body battered and his spirit shaken, he turns to the one person he knows will never falter...Batman.

entry.title: Brightest Star in the Night
entry.summary:
Author: FPeanutButter98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,513Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 30

Summary: When Batman saves an Alien from Luthor, he doesn't expect to fall in love with him. For Kal, Bruce is everything he could have dreamed of. In a world where everything is a secret, having someone by your side is the best superpower of all._Note, you do not need to have read Absolute Superman to understand this fic!
